subject: usb: gadget: legacy: fix error return code of multi_bind()
notes: Reused features.json from err-4-rep1 (already labelled fits_pattern=true, bug_type=error-return-code-not-set).
Pattern is structurally identical to err-1: variable name `status` instead of `err`. Generalised predicate to accept status/err/ret/rc/error as the return-code identifier.
POC + seed slice mirror multi_bind pre-fix shape; verifier-v1 OK on first try (F1.acq=0 F1.rel=0 F3.goto=4 F5.ret=5 F2.if=6).
All 3 predicates compile + validate on first iteration. Final query fires on multi_bind_buggy line 52 (NULL-branch goto), silent on multi_bind_fixed.
Second retry after Anthropic weekly-limit reset, per parent agent.
